where.if: AND (b.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.inquiry LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.sql: a.id ,a.faq_category ,a.inquiry ,a.ans_content ,a.display_yn ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,b.user_name AS createNm ,c.user_name AS modifiedNm ,d.code_name AS faqCategoryNm
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM tb_csm_faq_list a LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user b ON a.create_id = b.id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user c ON a.modified_id = c.id LEFT JOIN tb_cmm_code d ON a.faq_category = d.code AND d.code_group='faq_cate'

SELECT
FROM tb_csm_faq_list a LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user b ON a.create_id = b.id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user c ON a.modified_id = c.id LEFT JOIN tb_cmm_code d ON a.faq_category = d.code AND d.code_group='faq_cate' WHERE a.id=#{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_csm_faq_list SET modified_id=#{modifiedId},
inquiry=#{inquiry},
ans_content=#{ansContent},
faq_category=#{faqCategory},
display_yn=#{displayYn},
modified_date=NOW() WHERE id=#{id};
